mapper.sql: id, asset_code, asset_name, category_id, asset_status, model, position, price, purchase_date, expire_date, use_user_id, use_user_name, use_department_id, remark, create_time, update_time, create_by, is_deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_asset ( asset_code, asset_name, category_id, asset_status, model, position, price, purchase_date, expire_date, remark, create_by, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{assetCode}, #{assetName}, #{categoryId}, #{assetStatus}, #{model}, #{position}, #{price}, #{purchaseDate}, #{expireDate}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, 0 )
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_asset WHERE is_deleted = 0
AND asset_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_asset SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE sys_asset
asset_name = #{assetName},
category_id = #{categoryId},
model = #{model},
position = #{position},
price = #{price},
purchase_date = #{purchaseDate},
expire_date = #{expireDate},
remark = #{remark},
update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
